expectations.evidence: File is named postmortem.md without a PM-XXX prefix

Has Summary, Timeline, Root Cause, Lessons Learned. Missing dedicated Symptom section (symptom details are embedded in Summary/Root Cause). Uses 'Resolution' instead of 'Fix Applied' which is acceptable. Has no 'Prevention' header — uses 'Action Items' instead. Missing dedicated Impact section.
**Severity:** P1 (application fails to start) — uses P1 rather than Critical/High/Medium/Low but conveys severity
Action Items section uses a table format with numbered rows, not '- [ ]' checkbox format
Mentions 'UnsatisfiedDependencyException' and the full error message about RestClient bean not found
Both ExternalApiConfig and ShopifyPriceSyncAdapter are named throughout the document
Explains 'ExternalApiConfig was annotated with @Profile("!local")' but 'ShopifyPriceSyncAdapter still had a hard dependency on the shopifyRestClient bean via @Qualifier'
